SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUN-19-2002 - AFTER TRIAL DE NOVO, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF, AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 PLUS PLAINTIFF'S COSTS OF SUIT. JUDGMENT SIGNED.

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-19-2002 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Case assigned for Small Claims Appeal Trial de novo. Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff. Plaintiff/respondent Peter S. Mu appears in pro per; defendant/appellant Julie Martinez appears in pro per. The parties are sworn and testify. The court examines evidence submitted by the parties. The court accompanies the parties in order to inspect the vehicles which are the subjects of this lawsuit. The court awards judgment for plaintiff, and aginst defendant, in the amount of $500.00 plus plaintiff's costs of suit. Judgment signed.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-05-2002 Text Ruling
